title: Separate portfolio & events photos, fix customer visibility on Find Organisers page

requirements.summary: Fix OrganizerCard and EventPhotoLightbox to show event photos instead of portfolio images when clicking 'View' button
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'View' on an organiser card in the Find Organisers page (GuestOrganizerBrowsing) opens a gallery/lightbox showing only that organiser's event photos
Portfolio images do not appear in this lightbox
If the organiser has no event photos uploaded, the lightbox/gallery shows an appropriate empty state message

file_operations.description: Add a new React Query hook useGetOrganizerEventPhotos that fetches all event photos (EventPhoto[]) from the backend and filters them to return only photos owned by a specific organizer Principal. This hook will be used by EventPhotoLightbox to display the correct event photos for each organizer.

Refactor EventPhotoLightbox to accept an organizerId prop and use the new useGetOrganizerEventPhotos hook to fetch and display event photos (EventPhoto records) instead of portfolio_images. Update the component to map EventPhoto.blob to displayable URLs using imageUtils. Show an empty state message 'No event photos available' when the organizer has no event photos. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing.

Update the GuestOrganizerBrowsing page to pass the correct organizerId to EventPhotoLightbox when opening the lightbox after clicking 'View' on an OrganizerCard. Ensure the lightbox state management tracks which organizer's event photos should be displayed.

Ensure the 'View' button click handler in OrganizerCard correctly triggers the EventPhotoLightbox with the organizer's userId (Principal). Confirm the button wiring opens the lightbox to display event photos, not portfolio images.

requirements.summary: Ensure OrganizerDashboard has clearly separated sections for events photos and portfolio images upload
acceptanceCriteria: OrganizerDashboard has a clearly labelled 'Events Photos' section separate from 'Portfolio Images'
The Events Photos section uses EventPhotoUpload and only reads/writes event photos
The Portfolio Images section uses PortfolioUpload and only reads/writes portfolio images
No cross-contamination of images between the two sections

file_operations.description: Add a dedicated 'Events Photos' section to OrganizerDashboard below the 'Portfolio Images' section. This section should render the EventPhotoUpload component with a clear heading 'Events Photos' and descriptive text explaining these are photos from past events. Ensure the layout visually separates this section from the portfolio section using spacing and borders. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing EventPhotoUpload integration.

Ensure EventPhotoUpload uses the uploadEventPhoto mutation hook (or create one if missing in useQueries.ts) that calls backend.uploadEventPhoto with the ExternalBlob. Confirm the component fetches event photos using a hook that calls backend.getEventPhotos() and filters by the current organizer's Principal. Ensure delete functionality calls backend.deleteEventPhoto(photoId). Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add or verify mutation hooks for uploadEventPhoto and deleteEventPhoto that call the corresponding backend methods. Add a query hook useGetEventPhotos that fetches all event photos and optionally filters by owner Principal. Ensure these hooks are exported and available for EventPhotoUpload.

requirements.summary: Ensure OrganizerProfileView portfolio gallery only displays portfolio images, not event photos
acceptanceCriteria: OrganizerProfileView portfolio gallery renders only portfolio_images from the organiser profile
Event photos are not shown in OrganizerProfileView
The portfolio gallery shows an empty state if no portfolio images exist

file_operations.description: Review OrganizerProfileView to confirm the portfolio gallery section (PortfolioGallery component) receives only the profile.portfolio_images array and does not inadvertently fetch or display event photos. Ensure the component does not call getEventPhotos or mix event photos into the portfolio display. Add an empty state message 'No portfolio images available' when portfolio_images is empty.

Ensure PortfolioGallery accepts only a portfolio_images prop of type PortfolioImage[] and does not accept or render EventPhoto data. Confirm the gallery uses imageUtils to convert PortfolioImage objects to displayable URLs. Add an empty state if the array is empty.
